name: Rocky Road Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chocolate Wafer Crumbs 1/3 cup Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. Soften gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Mix cream cheese, sugar, cocoa, and vanilla in an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Gradually add gelatin, mixing until blended.
6. Fold in remaining ingredients; pour over crust.
7. Chill until firm.
